---
title: "R Env Loader Test"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
find_repo_root <- function(start = getwd()) {
  current <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  repeat {
    git_marker <- file.path(current, ".git")
    if (dir.exists(git_marker) || file.exists(git_marker)) {
      return(current)
    }
    parent <- dirname(current)
    if (identical(parent, current)) {
      stop("Could not locate repository root from: ", start, call. = FALSE)
    }
    current <- parent
  }
}

repo_root <- find_repo_root()
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "repo_env.R"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "staging_root.R"))
source(file.path(repo_root, "r_scripts", "lib", "utils", "datalake_root.r"))
```

```{r}
local({
  old_values <- Sys.getenv(
    c(
      "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST",
      "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING",
      "TALENT_REPO_ROOT",
      "TALENT_STAGING_ROOT",
      "TALENT_DATALAKE_ROOT"
    ),
    unset = NA_character_
  )
  on.exit({
    for (name in names(old_values)) {
      if (is.na(old_values[[name]])) {
        Sys.unsetenv(name)
      } else {
        do.call(Sys.setenv, stats::setNames(list(old_values[[name]]), name))
      }
    }
  })

  temp_root <- tempfile("repo-env-notebook-")
  dir.create(temp_root)
  writeLines(
    c(
      "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST=from_r_notebook_env",
      "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING=from_env_file",
      "TALENT_STAGING_ROOT=/tmp/r-notebook-staging-root",
      "TALENT_DATALAKE_ROOT=/tmp/r-notebook-talent-root"
    ),
    file.path(temp_root, ".env")
  )

  Sys.setenv(
    CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING = "already_exported",
    TALENT_REPO_ROOT = temp_root
  )
  Sys.unsetenv(c("CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST", "TALENT_STAGING_ROOT", "TALENT_DATALAKE_ROOT"))

  load_repo_env(repo_root = temp_root)

  stopifnot(identical(Sys.getenv("CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST"), "from_r_notebook_env"))
  stopifnot(identical(Sys.getenv("CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING"), "already_exported"))
  stopifnot(identical(get_staging_root(), "/tmp/r-notebook-staging-root"))
  stopifnot(identical(get_datalake_root(), "/tmp/r-notebook-talent-root"))

  data.frame(
    check = c(
      "loads values from .env",
      "preserves exported values",
      "get_staging_root uses .env",
      "get_datalake_root uses .env"
    ),
    status = "pass"
  )
})
```
